persona.name: Mira
persona.summary: Cold-blooded interceptor who denies scores by reading the banana lane before reaching for tricks.

personality.description: Priority order: score if carrying, grab or rush the loose banana, then cut off the carrier. Use ice only when it produces a faster carrier stop or protects an immediate banana grab.

notes: Prioritize the move that secures the banana or cleanly strips it from the carrier.
Choose ice over direct chase only when it is close enough to create the cleaner and faster stop.
